name: signal-market
description: Global AI technology signal intelligence for human and agent decision systems

tools.name: get_signals
tools.description: Fetch all AI/tech signals with stage, confidence, evidence count, and sources

parameters.limit: Optional: number of signals to return (default: 50)

tools.name: get_causal
tools.description: Get causal chain for a signal — why it's happening, primary causes, accelerants, inhibitors

parameters.signal_id: Signal ID (evt_001) or topic name (AI Agents)

tools.name: get_brief
tools.description: Get decision brief for signals — executive summary with recommendations and watchlist candidates

parameters.limit: Optional: number of top signals to include (default: 5)

tools.name: get_world_state
tools.description: Get world state for a signal — full causal + action layer merged

tools.name: rank_signals
tools.description: Get signals ranked by agent actionability score — what to act on RIGHT NOW. Score = (urgency × 0.4) + (confidence × 0.35) + (impact × 0.25) + stage_boost

tools.name: compare_signals
tools.description: Compare 2-5 signals side-by-side with verdict on which is more urgent/actionable

parameters.topics: Comma-separated topic names (AI Agents,LLM Infrastructure) — up to 5

tools.name: filter_signals
tools.description: Structured filter for signals by stage, urgency, confidence, topic, source with sorting

tools.name: get_topics
tools.description: List all tracked topics with their stages and confidence levels

tools.name: get_stats
tools.description: Get platform statistics — signal counts, sources, pipeline status, data freshness

tools.name: get_pipeline_status
tools.description: Get per-source pipeline status, items collected, data age
